arts.ttl: The problem? Mbappe under pressure at Real Madrid as PSG thrive
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain had a wobble against Aston Villa but they came through a tough examination and Luis Enrique believes they will be stronger for it. They remain the favourites to win the Champions League. Over to you, Kylian Mbappe.

arts.ttl: How Arsenal are being gaslit ahead of crunch Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta’s side take a three-goal lead to the Spanish capital, an advantage that should be safe yet feels oddly vulnerable

arts.ttl: Arsenal agreeing deal for next Lewis-Skelly as Real Madrid play hardball
arts.sum: football.london says: Garcia staying in Spain and going to Madrid would be a blow after Arsenal prioritised the player for the backup goalkeeper position. football.london understands Garcia is a priority target of the Gunners for the backup goalkeeper position.

arts.ttl: Facing almost certain defeat, Real Madrid can prove again why they are the scourge of English clubs
arts.sum: The Spanish giants have a near impossible task on their hands to overcome a three-goal deficit against Arsenal but their record against Premier League clubs gives them reason to hope

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano says club wants to sell £64m striker wanted by Arsenal 'as soon as possible'
arts.sum: Arsenal have a big summer coming up on the transfer front as Mikel Arteta looks to strengthen his ranks in pursuit of glory in multiple...

arts.ttl: Declan Rice's romance with childhood sweetheart Lauren Fryer and how they beat online trolls
arts.sum: Arsenal star Declan Rice is preparing to take on Real Madrid at the Santiago Bernabeu this Wednesday - and his girlfriend Lauren Fryer will likely be supporting him in Spain

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Arsenal simulated to predict Champions League quarter-final fate
arts.sum: Two incredible Declan Rice free-kicks followed by a Mikel Merino strike saw Arsenal beat Real Madrid 3-0 at the Emirates Stadium last week, with the victory sending the Gunners into the quarter-final second leg with a huge three-goal advantage over the current Champions League holders. Arsenal take a three-goal lead into their Champions League quarter-final second-leg clash against Real Madrid later today, where only a major capitulation would see the Gunners knocked out of the competition.

arts.ttl: The biggest Real Madrid comebacks in the Champions League and European Cup
arts.sum: No team does comebacks in the Uefa Champions League like Real Madrid. It’s become a hallmark of many of their recent runs to glory in the competition, going behind only to rise from the dead to snatch victory from the jaws of defeat. But it’s also been the case historically; they have successfully come back […] The post The biggest Real Madrid comebacks in the Champions League and European Cup first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Declan Rice's girlfriend had 'sad' conversation with Dani Dyer after cruel online trolling
arts.sum: Trolls on social media have targeted Arsenal star Declan Rice's girlfriend, and Dani Dyer has revealed that the pair had a heart-to-heart over the brutal comments

arts.ttl: ‘I was tabled five-year Real Madrid deal – I was convinced to choose Arsenal instead’
arts.athr: mirrornews@mirror.co.uk (Kasra Moradi, Aaron Morris, Maria Ortega)
arts.sum: Arsenal could knock Real Madrid out of the Champions League on Wednesday, and one Gunners legend in particular would relish such a result given he snubbed Los Blancos to join the Gunners
